- Edit source files (`.ejs`, `.scss`) — NEVER edit compiled output files (`.css`, `.html`) directly
- NEVER run `npm run build`, `build-scss`, or `build-html` manually. The dev server handles this automatically.
- `npm run dev` (run inside `public/`) starts the watcher + live server. If it is already running, all `.scss` and `.ejs` changes are picked up automatically — no manual build step needed.
- Always validate UI/print changes at `http://localhost:8088` using the Chrome DevTools MCP tool (screenshot, evaluate, emulate print). Do NOT open `file://` URLs for validation.
- For print layout, use Chrome DevTools print emulation (`emulateMedia: print`) — do not build a separate PDF or reload from file.
- Only rebuild manually if the dev watcher is confirmed to NOT be running.
